2604.06279.title: Plasma GraphRAG: Physics-Grounded Parameter Selection for Gyrokinetic Simulations
2604.06279.paper_summary: Accurate parameter selection is fundamental to gyrokinetic plasma simulations, yet current practices rely heavily on manual literature reviews, leading to inefficiencies and inconsistencies. We introduce Plasma GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) with large language models (LLMs) for automated, physics-grounded parameter range identification. By constructing a domain-specific knowledge graph from curated plasma literature and enabling structured retrieval over graph-anchored entities and relations, Plasma GraphRAG enables LLMs to generate accurate, context-aware recommendations. Extensive evaluations across five metrics, comprehensiveness, diversity, grounding, hallucination, and empowerment, demonstrate that Plasma GraphRAG outperforms vanilla RAG by over $10\%$ in overall quality and reduces hallucination rates by up to $25\%$. {Beyond enhancing simulation reliability, Plasma GraphRAG offers a methodology for accelerating scientific discovery across complex, data-rich domains.
2604.06279.paper_summary_zh: 精確的參數選擇對於旋轉動力學等離子體模擬至關重要，然而目前的做法過度依賴手動文獻回顧，導致效率低下和不一致性。我們介紹了Plasma GraphRAG，一個新穎的框架，將圖檢索增強生成（GraphRAG）與大型語言模型（LLMs）結合，用於自動化的、基於物理的參數範圍識別。通過從精選的等離子體文獻中構建特定領域的知識圖譜，並啟用對圖形錨定實體和關係的結構化檢索，Plasma GraphRAG使LLMs能夠生成準確的、上下文感知的建議。對五個指標的廣泛評估，包括全面性、多樣性、基礎性、幻覺和賦能，顯示Plasma GraphRAG在整體質量上超過普通RAG超過$10\%$，並將幻覺率降低了最多$25\%$。{除了增強模擬的可靠性，Plasma GraphRAG還提供了一種加速科學發現的方法，適用於複雜的、數據豐富的領域。
2604.06279.author: Ruichen Zhang et.al.
2604.06279.authors: Ruichen Zhang, Feda AlMuhisen, Chenguang Wan, Zhisong Qu, Kunpeng Li, Youngwoo Cho, Kyungtak Lim, Virginie Grandgirard, Xavier Garbet
